exam_name: CSET Mathematics Subtest II (Geometry, Probability & Statistics)
certification_name: Single Subject Teaching Credential in Foundational-Level Mathematics

testing_centers.notes: By appointment year-round, Monday through Saturday (excluding some holidays).

exam_rules: Review the list of materials that are prohibited at the test center. Read all testing policies and rules upon registration.
target_audience: Individuals seeking a Single Subject Teaching Credential in Foundational-Level Mathematics

prerequisites.description: Required for California Single Subject Math or Math (Foundational-Level) credential

retake_policy.notes: If you have previously passed one or more subtests of the CSET: Mathematics examination prior to December 29, 2014, your scores will remain valid and you will not have to retake those subtests.

official_objectives_url: Review the test structure for CSET: Foundational-Level Mathematics

official_study_resources.title: Preparation Materials
official_study_resources.notes: View the tutorials and preparation materials available for this test.

aliases: cset mathematics subtest ii geometry probability statistics
single subject teaching credential in foundational-level mathematics
